items.name: All Hallow's Sword
items.description: Slash at your foes and deal 15 damage per hit.  If you're looking to do something a little more interesting - hit 'Q' to grow vines that will stun and trap anyone within a 15 stud radius.  The 'E' key will shoot 10 vines in front of you to hit your opponents - doing  12 damage. Finally - press the 'X' key  to activate a vine like shield, which arises from the ground and surrounds you for 20 seconds. It does 20 damage to anyone who runs into it.

items.name: Diamond Blade Sword
items.description: What cuts like diamond? Nothing. Swing this super powerful sword over your head.  As it sparkles around you, the sword does powerful damage to your foe. If you manage to blox them, they will turn into a diamond as they fall apart.

items.name: Red Energy Sword
items.description: The last scientist who knew how to make energy swords passed away in a horrific energy sword accident.  Don't worry, he wasn't using his own energy swords (which function perfectly!).  He was testing a competitor's imitation sword when the energy suddenly exploded.  But this is not the end for energy swords!  They will live on.  How?  That's for another energy sword desciption.  How did we get these ones?  Duh - they were hidden in the scientist's basement.

items.name: Meteor Staff
items.description: Let the fires and stones of the sky rain down upon all who dare defy you.  If your opponent gets hit by one of the meteors you summon, he will meet a swift end.  Only you are protected from the shower of debris that will rain down when you summon it.

items.name: Mythic Sword of the West Wind
items.description: May you slash with all the colors of the wind. Slash your enemies, dealing 18 to 33 damage. Enemies also get pushed back from the force of the wind. Hit the 'Q' key, to activate the special attack causing you to spin around in circles and blow away nearby enemies.

items.name: Staff of Gloomy Grip
items.description: One click and a gloomy hand does your bidding. Tip - Try grabbing something with the staff and then walking!

items.name: Levitating Staff of the Cosmos
items.description: Send your enemies flying into the deepest regions of the Robloxian universe.

items.name: Knight's Sword
items.description: Keep down the peasant uprisings with this gleaming longsword.

items.name: Mythic Sword of the Earth
items.description: Protect Mother Earth with this mighty sword. Slash away at your enemies and leave behind a quaking trail of earth. 15 - 22 damage per swing. While the sword is equipped, the wielder leaves a trail of broken, quaking earth that causes anyone that steps on it to trip and fall.

items.name: Ice Potion
items.description: It's a slippery slope with this potion.  Even if it's not a slope!

items.name: Gigantoform
items.description: Double your size and and tower over your opponents.

items.name: Tic Tac Toe Board
items.description: Play a quick game of Tic Tac Toe with a nearby player! (Get close to another player and click on them to start a game - they need to accept your challenge for the game to start).

items.name: Sword of the Seven Winters
items.description: Summon the blizzard of seven winters, causing snow for you and all around you.  Lucky for you, you knew the blizzard was coming and can move quickly in the snow that slows your enemies.  Does 20 damage.

items.name: Sorcus' Sword of Judgement
items.description: "Judge a man by his questions rather than by his answers" -Voltaire

items.name: Sun Slayer Sword
items.description: The chosen weapon of the Sun Slayer. Each swing strikes true and swift.

items.name: The Awe Star
items.description: Awe... SNAP! As of November 13, 2009 there are exactly equal numbers of Awe Stars and Ninja Masks of Awesomeness in existence. If you combine both items, the Awe Star becomes a weapon of Ninjitsu domination!

items.name: Hard Boiled Roadster
items.description: Hop into this egg-shaped car and speed down the bunny trail!

items.name: iLift
items.description: Next time someone asks - "Do you even lift?"  You can let them know exactly how much you lift... with a bar bell to the belly.

items.name: Earth's Might Staff
items.description: Summon a heavy boulder to drop on your enemies.  If you click and hold, the boulder will gain more force!

items.name: Mostly Ghostly Potion
items.description: How can you be mostly ghostly? Click to fly around as a ghost; your character appears transparent and can fly!

items.name: Chameleon Potion
items.description: No it's not a karma chameleon - and thank goodness for that!  This will transform your appearance to be like whatever you click.  Now you see me... now you think I'm a grey baseboard.

items.name: Kami Potion
items.description: Fly around the world shooting laser beams out of your eyes.  Can you think of a better way to spend an afternoon?  Because I can't.  And I really tried.

items.name: DarkAge Nunchuks
items.description: Swing these bad boys around by clicking and deal 15 damage.  Dare to double click?  The nunchuks will split in two and do double damage. When equipped, you hold the nunchuks out in front of you in both hands.

items.name: The Luck O' the Irish
items.description: You just got McPwned.

items.name: Advanced Exploding Lab Table
items.description: A lab table fit for a senior mad scientist. Click to drop the table where you're standing. A few seconds later, it explodes! The table breaks apart and pieces flung everywhere as well as dangerous chemicals.

items.name: Staff of Crimson Chaos Fire
items.description: Ignis Rex once scourged an entire nation with flames, creating in the process the vast glassy field now known as the Obsidian Flat, before he was eventually contained and imprisoned deep beneath the Earth.

items.name: Sword of Swords
items.description: Yo Dawg!  We heard you liked swords, so we made you a sword made of swords so you can slash while you slash.

items.name: Paper Sword
items.description: Okay - let's be real here - a paper sword does as much damage as well....paper.  But it does do some other silly stuff.

items.name: Ghostly Possessed Sword of Terror
items.description: A ghostly sword, possessed by the souls of slain warriors, thirsty for revenge...Click to release its binding and it attacks on its own.

items.name: Victrola
items.description: Play that old timey song and create a sonic blast - blowing people back and doing 20 damage.
